change.old_rule: public-component dominance used absolute component magnitudes only
change.new_rule: the signed predicted 12-hour public component must have the same sign as the selected total 12-hour forecast and trade direction, in addition to satisfying the preregistered absolute dominance ratio

reason: The economic hypothesis is specifically that the delayed trade harvests the persistent public-information component after the initial reversal. A large public component pointing against the trade does not instantiate that hypothesis even when its absolute magnitude is dominant.
